title: Research & Technology Unlock
description: Player spends sector resources to unlock new blocks and units via the tech tree research dialog

actors.name: Player
actors.notes: Local campaign player; cannot research if net.client()

actors.name: GameService
actors.notes: Listens to ResearchEvent / UnlockEvent; completes achievements (researchRouter, researchAll, researchLogic)

actors.name: NetworkClient
actors.notes: Read-only view; research buttons disabled; rebuild triggered on UnlockEvent

use_cases.name: Open Research Dialog
use_cases.trigger: Keybinding Binding.research OR planet UI shown() callback
steps: rebuildItems() — aggregates ItemSeq from all sector storages for current planet

use_cases.name: Browse Tech Tree
steps: View.clamp() constrains pan within bounds Rect
View.drawChildren() renders connection lines between TechTreeNodes

use_cases.name: Inspect Node Details
use_cases.trigger: Hover (desktop) or tap (mobile) on ImageButton node
steps: infoTable populated: content.localizedName, requirements list (ItemStack[] from TechNode), finishedRequirements progress %
Objectives listed if node not selectable (requirements not met)
Info button calls ui.content.show(node.content) — opens content database entry
conditions: selectable(node): content.unlockedHost() OR no incomplete objectives

use_cases.name: Switch Tech Tree (Planet)
steps: Lists TechTree.roots, filters by requiresUnlock + unlockedHost()
switchTree(node): clears nodes set, creates new TechTreeNode root, View.rebuildAll()
rebuildItems() refreshes ItemSeq for new planet's sectors
use_cases.guard: Only shown if >1 eligible tech tree root exists (showTechSelect)

use_cases.name: Spend Resources to Research
use_cases.trigger: Click locked node (desktop) OR tap 'Research' button in infoTable (mobile)
preconditions: canSpend(node): selectable AND (requirements empty OR at least one item available in items ItemSeq)
steps: For each ItemStack req in node.requirements: compute used = min(req.amount - completed.amount, items.get(req.item))
items.remove(req.item, used) — triggers custom ItemSeq.add() with negative amount
ItemSeq.add() distributes removal proportionally across sector storages via sector.removeItem(item, toRemove)
completed.amount += used; if completed.amount < req.amount → complete = false
View.rebuild(shine[]) and itemDisplay.rebuild(items, usedShine) update UI

use_cases.name: Unlock Content
steps: Calls onUnlock() hook on the content
Parent node chain also unlocked (multiplayer parent sync)
postconditions: UnlockEvent fired → GameService checks achievement milestones

use_cases.name: View Available Resources
use_cases.trigger: Dialog shown or after research spend
steps: rebuildItems() builds ItemSeq from all planet sectors with hasBase() && !isFrozen()
ItemsDisplay.rebuild(items) renders item counts (hidden for net.client())
Each node's infoTable live-labels current/required item counts

use_cases.name: Open Content Database
use_cases.trigger: Buttons bar 'Database' button OR info button on node infoTable

key_classes.name: GameService
key_classes.notes: Achievement tracker; listens to ResearchEvent and UnlockEvent

key_relationships: ResearchDialog contains TechTreeNode (inner class wrapping TechNode)
View calls ResearchDialog.locked(), selectable(), checkNodes(), treeLayout()
ItemSeq.add(negative) → sector.removeItem() distributes resource deduction across sectors
events_fired: ResearchEvent(UnlockableContent) — on View.unlock(), after spend completes
important_notes: Research is disabled for network clients (net.client()); they see read-only view
ItemSeq overrides add() to proportionally remove items from each sector's storage
TechNode.finishedRequirements[] tracks partial progress; node.save() persists it
selectable() requires all node.objectives to be complete (not just item requirements)
Parent nodes are auto-unlocked when a child is researched (multiplayer sync)
Planet context determines which tech tree root is shown on dialog open
